narrative.core_question: Explain strategic significance, practical boundaries, and enterprise landing path

chapters.title: Deck Logic
chapters.question: How should the discussion be staged for executive review?

slides.claim: The discussion must move from strategic shift to enterprise landing discipline.

chapters.title: Strategic Framing
chapters.question: Explain strategic significance, practical boundaries, and enterprise landing path

slides.claim: The practical value comes from controlled execution, not only conversation quality.
Enterprise agent deployment requires explicit trust boundaries and verifiable execution contexts.

chapters.title: Control-First Architecture
chapters.question: How should enterprise agent systems be architected for governance?

slides.claim: A three-layer architecture separates policy, execution, and observability for enterprise governance.
Enterprises should treat agents as a control-first execution layer, not unchecked autonomy.
